entry.lex: Vanuatu, a UNESCO member with its capital in Port Vila, is governed by Charlot Salwai and is characterized by a diverse linguistic landscape including Letemboi, Litzlitz, Port Sandwich, Maragus, West Ambae, and Polonombauk.

entry.lex: Lay the Favorite is a comedy film starring Joshua Jackson and Laura Prepon, distributed by Cheetah Vision and rated not recommended for children under 12. The film was shot in the Las Vegas Valley and is set in Las Vegas and New York.

originaltripleset.otriple: Duchy of Savoy | instance_of | historical state

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Duchy of Savoy | instance_of | historical state

entry.lex: The Duchy of Savoy was a historical state within the Holy Roman Empire, with its capital in Turin and official languages including French, Latin, and Franco-Provençal.

Drishyam is a Malayalam-language drama film set in India, written by Jeethu Joseph and directed by both Joseph and Nishikant Kamat, with music composed by Vishal Bhardwaj and produced by Panorama Studios.
Cirkus Fjollinski is a public domain Swedish silent comedy film directed by Victor Bergdahl and distributed by Svenska Biografteatern, presented in black-and-white.

Povilas Šilas is a male police officer.

Arab Kingdom of Syria | governed_by | Faisal I of Iraq
Arab Kingdom of Syria | distinguished_from | Occupied Enemy Territory Administration

entry.lex: The Arab Kingdom of Syria was a historical constitutional monarchy in Asia, with Damascus as its capital, Arabic as its official language, and Faisal I of Iraq as head of state, replacing the Occupied Enemy Territory Administration.

originaltripleset.otriple: Vermont Republic | associated_with | American Revolutionary War

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Vermont Republic | associated_with | American Revolutionary War

entry.lex: The Vermont Republic was a proto-state and participant in the American Revolutionary War that replaced the provinces of New Hampshire and New York before being succeeded by Vermont. Its capital was Windsor and its official language was English.
iMoney.my is a financial services business headquartered in Kuala Lumpur.

Matri-Phony is an English-language black-and-white film directed by Harry Edwards and edited by Paul Borofsky, featuring a cast that includes Larry Fine, Marjorie Deanne, Monte Collins, Max Wagner, and Eddy Chandler.

entry.lex: 'Portrait of Jason' is an English-language LGBT-related film directed and edited by Shirley Clarke, featuring Carl Lee and distributed by Milestone Films. It has been inducted into the National Film Registry and carries no age restriction in France.

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Southern Qi | instance_of | historical Chinese dynasty

originaltripleset.otriple: Christian Friedrich Schultz | occupation | military officer
Christian Friedrich Schultz | served_as | cavalry master

Christian Friedrich Schultz | received_award | Hanoverian Waterloo Medal
Christian Friedrich Schultz | documented_in | Allgemeine Hannoversche Biographie

entry.lex: Christian Friedrich Schultz was a male military officer and diplomat who served as a cavalry master in the Husarenregiment. He received the Hanoverian Waterloo Medal and is documented in the Allgemeine Hannoversche Biographie; he died in Hanover and is buried at Lent-Kaserne.
Wu Shi is a female human with the family name Wu and is the wife of Zhou Jing.

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Steel Frontier | has_actor | Billy L. Sullivan

Frances Elizabeth Blacklock is a female human.

Ireland is a sovereign state and member of the European Union and World Trade Organization. It includes administrative entities such as County Limerick, Meath, and Kerry, maintains diplomatic relations with the Holy See, and recognizes Irish Sign Language.

Malawi is a member of the African Union, World Trade Organization, and ICSID, governed by a President. Its cultural identity is defined by the culture of Malawi, the Nyakyusa and Nyika languages, and the national anthem 'Mulungu dalitsa Malaŵi', with the Shire River marking its lowest point.

Theo Vondano | received_award | Cross of the Order of Merit of the Federal Republic of Germany

entry.lex: Theo Vondano was a German politician from the Christian Democratic Union who served as a Member of the Landtag of Rhineland-Palatinate in Mainz. Born and deceased in Kaiserslautern, he was awarded the Cross of the Order of Merit of the Federal Republic of Germany.
Gesundheit! Institute is a US-based business headquartered in Hillsboro.

originaltripleset.otriple: Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | instance_of | historical country
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | governed_by | Peter II
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | governed_by | Josip Broz Tito

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | instance_of | historical country
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | governed_by | Peter II
Democratic Federal Yugoslavia | governed_by | Josip Broz Tito

entry.lex: Democratic Federal Yugoslavia was a sovereign historical country with its capital in Belgrade. It was a monarchy headed by state leader Peter II and government head Josip Broz Tito, utilizing the Yugoslav dinar as currency and Serbo-Croatian as its official language. Its legislative body was the Anti-Fascist Council of the People's Liberation of Yugoslavia, and it shared a border with the Democratic Government of Albania.

Sint Eustatius | located_in | The Netherlands Antilles

entry.lex: The Netherlands Antilles was a historical constitutional monarchy located in the Caribbean and part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, with Papiamento as its official language and Sint Eustatius as one of its administrative entities.

Hubert de Tombeur is a male judge.

Kingdom of the Lombards | instance_of | elective monarchy
Kingdom of the Lombards | located_in | Pavia
Kingdom of the Lombards | has_language | Latin
Kingdom of the Lombards | has_language | Vulgar Latin

entry.lex: The Kingdom of the Lombards was a historical European kingdom and elective monarchy based in Pavia, where Latin was the official language and Vulgar Latin was commonly used. Its currency was the Tremissis.
Lockende Sterne is a German black-and-white drama film directed by Hans Müller and set in Hamburg, featuring a score by Friedrich Schröder and an FSK 12 rating.
Julian Patrick Lucas is a male human.

originaltripleset.otriple: Pork and Milk | instance_of | documentary film
Pork and Milk | written_by | Valérie Mréjen
Pork and Milk | directed_by | Valérie Mréjen
Pork and Milk | has_rating | no age restriction

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Pork and Milk | instance_of | documentary film
Pork and Milk | written_by | Valérie Mréjen
Pork and Milk | directed_by | Valérie Mréjen
Pork and Milk | has_rating | no age restriction

entry.lex: 'Pork and Milk' is a French documentary film written and directed by Valérie Mréjen, featuring cinematography by Céline Bozon and an original language of Hebrew. It has no age restriction in France.

A False Suspicion | has_actor | Dorothy Phillips
A False Suspicion | has_actor | Dolores Cassinelli

entry.lex: A False Suspicion is a public domain American silent short drama film produced by Essanay Studios, starring Francis X. Bushman, Bryant Washburn, Dorothy Phillips, and Dolores Cassinelli.

originaltripleset.otriple: Petru Tămăian | associated_with | Great National Assembly of Alba Iulia

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Petru Tămăian | associated_with | Great National Assembly of Alba Iulia

entry.lex: Petru Tămăian was a Romanian priest who participated in the Great National Assembly of Alba Iulia.
The Hausa Kingdoms were historical countries located in Africa.

originaltripleset.otriple: Sébastien Populaire | served_as | Mayor of Touillon-et-Loutelet
Sébastien Populaire | served_as | municipal councillor of Touillon-et-Loutelet

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Sébastien Populaire | served_as | Mayor of Touillon-et-Loutelet
Sébastien Populaire | served_as | municipal councillor of Touillon-et-Loutelet

entry.lex: Sébastien Populaire is a French engineer and politician who serves as the Mayor and a municipal councillor of Touillon-et-Loutelet.
Terminal Virus is an English-language post-apocalyptic film from the United States, produced by Roger Corman, distributed by New Concorde, and starring James Brolin.

originaltripleset.otriple: Jan František Štyvar | died_in | Uherský Brod

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Jan František Štyvar | died_in | Uherský Brod

entry.lex: Jan František Štyvar was a male writer and parson born in Příbor who died by homicide in Uherský Brod.

originaltripleset.otriple: Francia | documented_in | Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Francia | documented_in | Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary

entry.lex: Francia, described by the Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary, replaced Germania Secunda. It had Aachen and Tournai as capitals, utilized Latin and Frankish as languages, and was characterized by Christianity and the Catholic Church.
Dʿmt was a historical kingdom and monarchy located in Africa, with its capital at Yeha.

A Concerto for the Violin | has_format | 3:1 aspect ratio

entry.lex: Directed by Charles Brabin and produced by Edison Studios in the United States, 'A Concerto for the Violin' is a public domain black-and-white short film with a 3:1 aspect ratio.
Sui was an ancient Chinese state.

originaltripleset.otriple: HSBC (Midland Bank) | located_in | Vale of Glamorgan

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: HSBC (Midland Bank) | located_in | Vale of Glamorgan

entry.lex: HSBC (Midland Bank) is a Grade II listed bank located in the Vale of Glamorgan, United Kingdom.
Champaner is a village in India located in Halol Taluka (time zone 30) that is also recognized as a historical country.

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Unión Aérea Española | instance_of | transport company

entry.lex: Unión Aérea Española is a Spanish transport company.
Fonko is a documentary film directed and edited by Göran Olsson, Lars Lovén, and Lamin Daniel Jadama.
Western Chu was a historical country led by Xiang Yu.
Mikel Mendizabal is a male Spanish bertsolari from Itsasondo who speaks Basque.

originaltripleset.otriple: Le K Benzema | instance_of | documentary television film
Le K Benzema | associated_with | Karim Benzema

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Le K Benzema | instance_of | documentary television film
Le K Benzema | associated_with | Karim Benzema

entry.lex: Le K Benzema is a French-language documentary television film about Karim Benzema, originally broadcast on Canal+.
Vincent Manago was a French Orientalist painter, born in Catania and died in Paris, who studied at the Académie Julian.
Oxborrows Hotel is a Grade II listed hotel located in Ipswich, United Kingdom.
Gilbert Sissons was a male minister educated at Pembroke College.
The kerajaan Pananjung was a historical country located in Pangandaran, West Java.
Keith Joubert is a South African male who is both an explorer and a painter.
